name: I-Perimortem Cesarean Section (PMCS)
description: Ukulethwa kokuhlinzwa okuphuthumayo kungakapheli imizuzu emi-4 yokuboshwa kwenhliziyo kamama ukuze kuvunyelwe i-CPR esebenzayo kanye nokusinda kwengane esanda kuzalwa. Isibeletho sicindezela i-aorta kanye ne-IVC -- ukubeletha nakho kuvuselela umama.
steps: Yenza ukusika umugqa omaphakathi oqondile ukusuka enkabeni uye ku-pubis ngokusebenzisa isikhumba ne-fascia.
Hambisa usana kumhlinzeki wesibili ukuze uthole ukuvuselelwa kwengane.
Pakisha isibeletho nesisu uma ukuvala okuqinisekile kungenzeki ngokushesha.
Qhubeka nokuvuselela komama -- I-ROSC maningi amathuba okuba ngemuva kokuwohloka kwesibeletho.
warnings: Isikhathi sesinqumo sokubeletha kufanele sibe ngaphansi kwemizuzu emi-5 ukuze uthole imiphumela engcono kakhulu kamama nengane.
Le nqubo iyisinyathelo sokugcina -- kuphela uma umama ebanjwe inhliziyo futhi ukubeletha sekuseduze (>emavikini angu-20 okukhulelwa).
Idinga ukuqeqeshwa kwezinga likadokotela. Imithi yokulwa kufanele ilungiselele inkundla nosekelo, hhayi ukusebenza ngokuzimela.
source: JTS Obstetric CPG / ACOG Emergency Guidelines
